provenance_notes: NEWLY ESTABLISHED PAIR. V_8.mov was originally conflated with V18.MOV in the scoring pipeline. Forensic fingerprint analysis (identical 45s cut phase, identical throw structure, identical drain outcome) confirmed the earlier 'score_chatgpt_V8_001' (141s/456) and the current Claude 'score_claude_V_8_001' (136s/460) are both evaluations of the same SURG20 wall-mount V_8.mov recording. The GPT-4o file has been relabeled from V8_video to V_8_video.

deltas.agreement_notes: Among the tightest teacher agreements in the V-series. Total FLS delta of 4.0 is comparable to V30 (1.3) and V31 (0.1). Both teachers independently read the same SURG20 wall-mount recording.

needle_load.note: Tight agreement on quick needle load.

first_throw.note: Claude keeps first throw open 6.6s longer.

suture_cut.note: SMOKING GUN - identical 45s cut phase. Forensic fingerprint that proved both scores are of the same video.

reconciled.reasoning: Teacher delta is very small (4.0 FLS, 5s). Midpoint reconciliation at 138.5s and 458 FLS.

cross_station_context: Fastest confirmed time at the SURG20 wall-mount station. Demonstrates skill transfer from the V11-V14 RCA lab setup.
